title: Tachyon configuration (tachyon.yml)
description: Declares the agents, layouts, and settings Tachyon orchestrates in this workspace.

agents.description: Agents (AI CLIs, dev servers, watchers — any command) keyed by name.

cmd.description: Shell command that runs the agent.

cwd.description: Working directory, relative to the workspace root or absolute.

env.description: Extra environment variables for the agent's session.

autostart.description: Start this agent when Tachyon starts.

watch.description: Glob(s) — restart the agent when a matching file changes.

restart.description: Crash policy: on-crash auto-restarts when the process dies with a non-zero exit (backoff 2s/4s/8s, max 3 per minute). Clean exits (0) never auto-restart.

attention.description: Needs-you detection. Defaults: on for kind=agent, off for kind=terminal. Object form tunes the idle threshold and adds prompt patterns.

silenceSec.description: Seconds of unchanged pane + idle CPU before the agent is marked idle.

patterns.description: Extra prompt regexes (case-insensitive) that mark the agent as needing input.

kind.description: agent = AI CLI (claude, codex, ...); terminal = server/shell/build. Default: inferred from cmd. Drives sidebar grouping and attention defaults.

instructions.description: Role prompt for the agent (e.g. 'you are a code reviewer...'). Delivered as a positional argument on spawn for CLIs that accept one (claude, codex, gemini); stored but not auto-delivered otherwise.

grid.description: Grid shape for the editor area.

agents.description: Agents to place, in view-column order.

sizes.description: Proportions for the preset's top-level groups — must sum to 1 (e.g. [0.7, 0.3]).

layout.description: Captured/custom editor layout tree (what 'Save Current Layout As…' writes). Wins over 'grid'.

maxAgents.description: Max concurrently running agents in this workspace (fork-bomb guardrail). Overrides the tachyon.maxAgents editor setting.

bridgePort.description: Fixed port for the Bridge MCP server. Default: a stable per-workspace port derived from the workspace path (41000-42999) — registrations survive editor restarts either way.

auth.description: Require a Bearer token on every Bridge call (default true). The stable per-workspace token lives in extension storage and is injected as TACHYON_BRIDGE_TOKEN into every agent Tachyon spawns; registered configs reference the env var, so no secret lands in committable files.

layout.description: Layout applied automatically when the workspace activates (must exist under layouts:).

commands.description: One-shot commands (test, lint, migrate...): run -> exit -> show result. Unlike agents/terminals, exiting is expected (exit 0 = pass). Agents can run them via the curated run_command tool.

cmd.description: Shell command; its exit code is the result.

cwd.description: Working directory (relative to workspace root or absolute).

runbooks.description: Step-by-step procedures composed of commands. Steps run sequentially in their own sessions; a non-zero exit stops the runbook (the failed pane is kept). Steps are exact command-name references or inline shell strings.
